channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Learner Tien beats Daniil Medvedev and is the youngest US man in Australia's 3rd round since Sampras
item.description: Learner Tien has become the youngest American man to reach the Australian Open’s third round since Pete Sampras in 1990.
item.dc:creator: Howard Fendrich, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Utah Royals have busy offseason with massive roster overhaul
item.description: The Utah Royals have had a busy offseason. There have been departures and additions galore, as the team continues to try to improve before the 2025 NWSL season with the goal of making playoffs for the first time.
item.dc:creator: Stockton Mair, ABC 4

item.title: Travis Kelce shares Taylor Swift's thoughts on Chiefs star's possible retirement
item.description: Kansas City Chiefs star Travis Kelce shared Taylor Swift's thoughts about the possibility of him hanging up his cleats for good during an interview on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How about that?! Danielle Collins has a back-and-forth with a booing Australian Open crowd
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Danielle Collins got into a back-and-forth with a booing crowd at the Australian Open after eliminating a local player on Thursday night, blowing kisses to the spectators and repeating the phrase, “How about that?!” The 10th-seeded Collins, an American who was the runner-
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Ex-NFL star discusses why Deion Sanders should stay in college
item.description: Deion Sanders may be toying with the idea of joining his son and going to the NFL, but Vince Wilfork says he's better off staying in college.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tennis player Taylor Fritz is donating Australian Open prize money to LA wildfire relief funds
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — American tennis player Taylor Fritz said Thursday he is donating the prize money he earned for his first-round victory at the Australian Open — about $82,000 — to relief funds to help people affected by the wildfires in the greater Los Angeles area.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Aggies six-game winning streak ends at UNLV, 65-62
item.description: LAS VEGAS (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State basketball team suffered just its second loss of the season Wednesday night, falling at UNLV, 65-62. Tucker Anderson led the Aggies with 19 points, but the Aggies missed its last six shots of the game, and dropped to 16-2 on the season. Dedan Thomas Jr.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: NFL's wild-card round averages 28.3 million viewers, a 9.3% decline from last year
item.description: Viewer audiences for the first weekend of the NFL playoffs were down 9.3% from last year, a bigger decline than what the league experienced during the regular season.
item.dc:creator: KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Paris Olympic medals to be replaced after several athletes complain of tarnishing
item.description: A French mint is replacing medals from the 2024 Paris Olympics after several athletes have complained that they have already begun to deteriorate.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NBA reschedules games postponed by California wildfires, Atlanta winter storm
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The NBA has rescheduled two games postponed due to catastrophic wildfires in Southern California, as well as a game postponed due to a winter storm in Atlanta. The league announced Wednesday that the Los Angeles Lakers’ Jan.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Iowa State's 30-year streak of hitting a 3-pointer ends in win over Texas Tech
item.description: Iowa State's NCAA record streak of 945 consecutive games with a 3-pointer ended Tuesday night in a 71-58 victory over Texas Tech. The Cyclones had made a 3-pointer in every game dating back to Feb. 19, 1995, at Colorado when the school was still part of the Big Eight.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Montreal skates past Utah Hockey Club, 5-3
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club's season-long 7-game homestand is not going well. Utah lose for the third time in four games at the Delta Center, falling to the Montreal Canadians Tuesday night, 5-3.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Montréal Canadiens hockey player struck by car while in Salt Lake City
item.description: Montréal Canadiens hockey player Emil Heineman will be sidelined for several weeks after he was struck by a car in Salt Lake City.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: WATCH: Girls basketball coach accused of hitting person with car after argument
item.description: A girls' youth basketball coach is accused of hitting a person with his vehicle after an argument following a game Saturday in Columbia, according to state police, and it was caught on surveillance video.
item.dc:creator: Jenn Brink, Fox 5

item.title: Connor Ingram returns for Utah Hockey Club
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club began a seven-game homestand last week by winning just one of three games. But they still have four games left at the Delta Center beginning Tuesday night against Montreal.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Verlander uses supermodel wife's name on Giants introductory Zoom call, causing awkward moment
item.description: (KRON) -- Justin Verlander uses his wife's account for Zoom calls, and a member of the San Francisco media got a kick out of it. His account name caused a funny moment during his introductory press conference on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Bill McCartney, who coached Colorado to its only football national championship in 1990, has died
item.description: Bill McCartney, who coached Colorado to its only football national championship in 1990, has died. He was 84.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Former finalist Josiah Cox relishing opportunity to return with SDSU football
item.description: Cox had 35 tackles and two interceptions for the Aggies in his year in Las Cruces, including an impressive performance against ranked Texas A&M. Those skills were apparent to SDSU head coach Sean Lewis and a retooled defensive coaching staff.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Stone, Fox 5

item.title: Lakers game postponed Thursday; coach JJ Redick reportedly loses home in Palisades Fire
item.description: The Los Angeles Lakers game against the Charlotte Hornets scheduled for Thursday evening has been postponed as the community reels from the devastating fires throughout the city. The team announced the postponement on X on Thursday, stating that it'll be rescheduled to "focus on what matters most.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5
